report.summary: F&G climbs to 12 (Extreme Fear, up from 9) — BTC steady at ~$67,120 on Good Friday. Since v15: 3 agents ran (publish, eod, community) — publish-v8 promoted 5 more pages (740 total published). Production FROZEN at e3f63fc — 48th escalation. Stablecoin supply $315B ATH. 32 agent runs today totaling ~$1,667 human-equivalent.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v15 → v16: 3 agents ran since last standup — Publish-v8 (5 crypto-loans/defi-lending pages), EOD-v8 (QA audit), Community (social engagement). No build or design cycles this window.

BTC: ~$67,120 (flat from v15's $67,078). Good Friday — traditional markets closed, crypto volume thin (~$7.9B 24h). Narrow $66,900-$67,200 range holds. $67K acting as 2026's strongest support — every dip below quickly reclaimed.

F&G: Rises to 12 (Extreme Fear, up from 9 at v15). Still historically depressed — sub-15 for 3+ consecutive days. Lowest sustained trough since Terra-Luna collapse (Jun 2022). Historically, sub-10 readings preceded major accumulation phases within 30-90 days.
BTC DOMINANCE: 56.1% (down slightly from 56.2% at v15). Flight to quality continues but softening marginally.

STABLECOIN SUPPLY: $315B ATH confirmed by Q1 2026 close. Yield-bearing stablecoins grew 22% in Q1 alone. USDC gained $2B, USDT shed $3B — structural shift toward yield-bearing instruments. Record dry powder available for deployment.

PUBLISH-v8: 5 pages promoted — 3 crypto-loans reviews, 2 defi-lending best-of guides. QA: metadata + H1 + breadcrumbs verified on all 5; 2 defi-lending pages missing JSON-LD. Total published: 740 (up from 732 at v15).
MACRO: April catalyst calendar — CLARITY Act roundtable Apr 16 (12 days). Goldman Sachs signaling possible April recovery window. March closed +1.8% — first positive monthly close since Sep 2025.
SEARCH DEMAND: Extreme fear = elevated intent for crisis/accumulation content. DCA calculator, passive income guides, fear/greed explainers remain high-value pages.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data sourced from web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: 3 agents since v15 — Publish-v8 (+5 pages), EOD-v8 (QA audit flagging 166 uncommitted files), Community (social engagement cycle).
TODAY'S TOTAL: 32 agent runs (standup×12, eod×8, publish×8, community×3, design×1). This is the 16th standup version today.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 740 (up from 732 at v15). +8 pages in two publish cycles since v14.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE appears empty or near-empty. Publish cycles now pulling from unpublished-with-page.tsx pool. Queue effectively cleared.

EOD-v8 FINDINGS: 166 uncommitted files (145 untracked). 109 new pages promoted in uncommitted diff. Build crashes with bus error in sandbox (OOM — not indicative of Vercel). 141 TS errors across 4 files (non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors).
METADATA GAP: Accumulating SEO debt — latest batches have 2+ pages missing JSON-LD structured data per cycle.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (48th ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. Now 740 published slugs but only ~199 visible to Google (pre-freeze snapshot). 541+ pages invisible during peak fear-driven search demand. Every hour = irreversible lost indexing time.
P1 — TS ERRORS: 141 errors in 4 files (lido-v3 94, structured-data 40, crypto-arbitrage 4, rwa-yield 3). Non-blocking but growing tech debt.
P2 — JSON-LD BATCH: Multiple recently promoted pages missing structured data. Needs cleanup pass before deploy.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All work accumulates in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 48th ESCALATION): F&G recovering from 9→12 but still in extreme fear territory. 541+ pages invisible while highest-intent queries of 2026 fire. Deploy cost: $0. Deploy ROI: compounds hourly. Goldman Sachs signaling April recovery — if sentiment turns and we're still frozen, we miss the entire wave. This remains the single highest-leverage action.

PRIORITY 2 — JSON-LD + METADATA BATCH: Before deploy, sweep all recently promoted pages for missing structured data. At 740 published pages, even 5% with incomplete metadata = 37 pages with degraded search appearance. Quick win with compounding returns.

PRIORITY 3 — CONTENT FOR RECOVERY WINDOW: Extreme fear historically precedes 30-90 day accumulation. Start preparing content for sentiment recovery: 'best crypto to buy April 2026', 'crypto recovery guide', 'stablecoin yield strategies'. Position content before the wave, not after.
